noAccessBody: Management is available only to the committee and the developer.
title: Building Management
subtitle: Settings you won't find elsewhere: units, member access, and the building account.

overview.nothingWrong: Nothing's on fire. The building is running fine.
overview.noFaultsReported: No one has reported any issues yet.
overview.alertNoChargesTitle: No charges issued for this month yet
overview.alertNoChargesBody: Generate them in the Finance tab
overview.alertCodesFree_one: {{count}} access code waiting to be used
overview.alertCodesFree_other: {{count}} access codes waiting to be used
overview.alertCodesFreeBody: Send them to residents from the People tab

units.title: Building units
units.empty: No units yet. Add the first one — payments and voting are built on top of these.
units.totalShare: Total shares: {{pct}}%. Shares determine each owner's voting weight.
units.confirmDelete: Delete unit {{label}}? This also deletes its payment and voting history.

people.noneYet: No one has registered yet. Generate a code on the right and send it to your neighbors to get things started.
people.noCodesYet: No codes yet. Generate the first one above.
people.hint: Send the code to a neighbor — when they register, it links them to their unit with the right role. Delete unused codes; used ones stay in the history.
people.confirmRemove: Remove {{name}} from the building? They'll lose access to the app.

finance.emptyFor: No charges have been issued for {{period}}. Generate them with the button above — it's based on unit rents.
finance.note: A reminder sends a notification to the unit's members in the app. Set up Fio matching in the Settings tab.
finance.toastNoRent: No units have rent set up. Add it in the Units tab.
finance.toastNoMember: Unit {{unit}} has no member in the app

maintenance.pointerBody: Find the kanban board with photos, contractor assignment, and progress in the Issues section.

pointers.meetingsTitle: Meetings and voting have their own section
pointers.meetingsBody: Find share-weighted resolutions, proxies, and minutes generated from the results in the Meetings & Voting section.
pointers.boardBody: Find targeted sends and per-unit read receipts in the Announcements section.
pointers.docsBody: Find categories, role-based visibility, and signed links in the Documents section.

fund.visibleBody: Turn on transparency for whoever wants it. Residents will then see the fund balance and recent activity on their home screen — without committee contacts or the account number.
fund.noEntriesYet: No entries yet. Add the first contribution or expense above.
fund.toastShown: Residents can now see the fund
fund.toastHidden: The fund is now hidden from residents
fund.confirmDeleteEntry: Delete this entry? This will change the fund balance.

settings.accountNote: Residents' QR payments go to this account. Until it's filled in, the app won't offer QR payments, and neighbors will pay by transfer with manual confirmation.
settings.integrationStripeDesc: Rent charged by card and Apple Pay
settings.integrationEmailDesc: Reminders and announcements outside the app
settings.integrationsNote: We're rolling out integrations gradually. Let us know which one you need first.
settings.dataOwnershipTitle: The data belongs to the building, not to us
settings.dataOwnershipBody: Download a complete export anytime, yourself: units, members, all payments, announcements including per-unit read receipts, issues, votes with proxies, community concerns, and document files. CSV for Excel, JSON for machines. To end the service: one message to info@tasker.cz, and we delete all building data from the database and storage within 30 days.
settings.demoNoDocs: no document files in this demo
